creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
On Tue, 30 May 2000, Gerald Pfeifer wrote:
>> Please consider putting the perl line in the port until Wine
>> developers resync the sources on this issue.
> Can you install the patch nevertheless? [...]
> I'll then take care of the SOVERSION issue, one way or the other...

Okay, please install my original patch and on top of that, add
patches/patch-gc as follows, and do a  s/1.0/1/g  in pkg/PLIST.

Thanks,
Gerald

--- /dev/null	Tue May 30 13:03:39 2000
+++ patch-gc	Tue May 30 23:18:16 2000
